---
title: "My First R Markdown"
author: "Rehan"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

## Introduction

This is normal text. You write explanations here.

## R Code Chunk

```{r}
# This is R code
x <- 10
y <- 5
x + y
```

Common options:
- `echo=FALSE` → hide code  
- `eval=FALSE` → don’t run code  
- `include=FALSE` → run but show nothing  

---

## 🔹 5. One Real Example (simple but practical)

```markdown
---
title: "Sales Analysis"
output: html_document
---

## Data

```{r}
sales <- c(100, 200, 150, 300)
mean(sales)

plot(sales, type="o")
```
